rationale: Replaced the FastAPI dependency override lambda with the FakeTemporalService callable directly.
Review summary only; actionable child comments were classified separately.
Quiesce pause and resume now raise SystemOperationUnavailableError when required Temporal signal handlers are missing.
Repeated submissions with the same computed idempotency key now reuse the existing audit event and skip subsystem invocation, state updates, and new audit inserts.
Updated the Settings worker snapshot parser and test fixture to accept nullable mode and numeric version from the API response.
POST responses now return the actual computed signalStatus value such as succeeded:<count>.
Automated review summary only; actionable child comments were classified separately.
